actions.name: copy_document
actions.description: Copy an existing Google Docs document through Google Drive.

document_id.description: The ID of the Google Docs document to copy.

title.description: The title for the copied document.

include_shared_drives.description: Whether to include shared drives when locating the source document.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: The ID of the file in Google Drive.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file.

anyOf.description: A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.

parents.description: The IDs of the parent folders that contain the file.

anyOf.description: A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.
A string value that may be null.

items.description: Google Drive file owner.

shared.description: Whether the file has been shared with others.

starred.description: Whether the user has starred the file.

trashed.description: Whether the file has been trashed.

actions.name: create_document
actions.description: Create a Google Docs document and optionally insert initial text at the beginning.

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Docs document.

anyOf.description: A string value that may be null.

insertedTextLength.description: The number of characters inserted as initial text.

actions.name: search_documents
actions.description: Search Google Docs files with Google Drive filters.

query.description: A Google Drive query string or full-text search string.

order_by.description: A comma-separated list of fields to sort results by.

page_token.description: A page token from a previous search response.

max_results.description: The maximum number of files to return.

starred_only.description: Whether to return only starred files.

created_after.description: Only files created after this time are returned.

modified_after.description: Only files modified after this time are returned.

shared_with_me.description: Whether to return only files shared directly with the user.

include_shared_drives.description: Whether to include files from shared drives.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

id.description: The ID of the file in Google Drive.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the file.
